rows.league: V&DABA Night League (Victoria and District Amateur Basketball Association)
rows.evidence: vicbball.com/54-current-gym-schedules/arbutus.html — Arbutus gym schedule, U13B/U15B divisions; unique 'BN' teams: Bay City Rollers, Bay City Rollers 11, Ninenine, Thomson, da Bulls, Aventador, Storm, Bucks, Huracan. Arbutus is one of several V&DABA venues, so this may undercount the club's league-wide total.

rows.season: current (footer copyright 2026; exact season label not printed on page)
rows.evidence: pgminorbasketball.com/pgmba-schedule.php lists 19 named teams across 3 grade divisions: Gr.3-4 (Aces; Clippers, Grizzlies, Lakers = 4 teams), Gr.5-6 (Sky, Mystics; Nuggets, Thunder, Raptors, Blazers = 6 teams), Gr.7-8 (Liberty, Fever, Storm; Bulls, Pacers, Heat, Mavericks, Spurs, Warriors = 9 teams). PGMBA is a single-association house league (all 19 teams belong to PGMBA itself, not separate feeder clubs).

verdicts.evidence: Counted 13 Tornades entries across the 16 Fall 2025-26 divisions on basketballmontreal.org: Novice, Novice A (TWO teams — 'Tornades' + 'Tornades Black (2)'), Mini AA, Mini AAA, Mini A, Bantam AA, Bantam A, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AAA, Mini/Bantam/Cadet Girls AAA. The claim's 13 correctly includes the second Novice A entry.

verdicts.claim: "Lasalle Leaders" fields 12 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: LaSalle Leaders appears in 12 divisions: Novice, Mini AA, Mini AAA, Bantam AA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AA, Juvenile AAA, Mini/Bantam/Cadet Girls AAA. Exact match.
Brookwood appears in 11 divisions: Novice, Mini AAA, Bantam AA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AA, Juvenile AAA, Mini/Bantam/Cadet Girls AAA. Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "Pagé Concordia" fields 10 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: Pagé Concordia (listed as 'Page' in the club nav) appears in 10 divisions: Novice, Mini AA, Mini AAA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AAA, and all four Girls AAA divisions (Mini/Bantam/Cadet/Juvenile). Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "Laval Nobel" fields 10 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: Listed as 'Laval' in standings (club nav shows 'Laval Nobel'). Appears in 10 divisions: Mini AA, Mini AAA, Bantam AA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AA, Juvenile AAA, Mini/Bantam Girls AAA, Juvenile Girls AAA. Exact match.
Monarques appears in 9 divisions: Novice, Mini AAA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AAA, and all four Girls AAA divisions. Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "West Island Lakers" fields 9 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: West Island Lakers (WILBA) appears in 9 divisions: Novice, Mini AAA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AAA, Juvenile AAA, and all four Girls AAA divisions. Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "St Jean Riverains" fields 9 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: St Jean Riverains appears in 9 divisions: Mini AA, Mini A, Bantam AA, Cadet AA, Juvenile AAA, and all four Girls AAA divisions. Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "Club Basket de l'Ouest (Cavaliers)" fields 7 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: Listed as 'Club basket de L'ouest' (nav: 'CBO Cavaliers') in 7 divisions: Novice, Mini AA, Mini A, Bantam AA, Bantam A, Cadet AA, Juvenile AA. Boys-only, no girls entries. Exact match.

verdicts.claim: "DBC Hawks/Bobcats" fields 7 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: DBC teams: 'DBC Brossard Bobcats' in Novice, Mini AA, Mini AAA, Bantam AA, Cadet AA, Juvenile AA (6); 'DBC Hawks' in Bantam AA (1) = 7 exactly. A separate 'DBC St-Constant' entry in Bantam AAA (DBC runs a St-Constant location) could push the club to 8, still within ~14% tolerance either way.
verdicts.correction: Count is 7 for the Bobcats+Hawks named teams; possibly 8 if 'DBC St-Constant' (Bantam AAA) belongs to the same DBC club.

verdicts.claim: "DC Blues" fields 7 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: Only 7 boys teams are literally named 'DC Blues' (Novice A, Mini AA, Bantam AA, Bantam AAA, Cadet AA, Juvenile AA, Juvenile AAA), but the same club — Downtown Community Blues / DCB (MBL club page teams/dcb.html; Red Rush is DCB's program) — also fields 4 teams registered as 'DCB Red rush': Cadet AAA (boys) plus Bantam/Cadet/Juvenile Girls AAA. Club total is ~11. The 7 undercounts the actual DCB club by ~36% because its girls/Red-Rush arm uses a different display name and was missed.
verdicts.correction: DC Blues (Downtown Community Blues / DCB) actually fields ~11 teams: 7 named 'DC Blues' + 4 named 'DCB Red rush'.

verdicts.claim: "Chateauguay Ravens" fields 7 teams in "Montreal Basketball League (MBL)" (Fall 2025-26)
verdicts.evidence: Chateauguay Ravens appears in 7 divisions: Mini AA, Bantam AA, Cadet AA, Juvenile AAA (as 'Chateauguay Ravens'), and Mini/Bantam/Cadet Girls AAA (shown as 'Ravens'). Exact match.
